channel.title: Comments for page "The Ride Never Ends"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "The Ride Never Ends"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I also enjoyed the interplay, and I'm very fond of stories taking place on roller coasters. I think the interplay is helped tremendously by the repetition and the strong voice of the rider. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This was a fun read and it was interesting to see things from both the perspective of the rider and those who viewed them, as well as the events that played out and how they effected one another. +1

item.title: Author Note
item.content:encoded:
This is a quick little tale about what might have happened to the poor person who boarded the roller coaster, SCP-2183.

It does get lonely when you're up there by yourself.
